name: P90 | 大怪兽 RUSH
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. An olive and gold-colored hydrographic pattern of cartoon dinosaurs has been applied. Dinosaurs and aliens and comets, oh my!
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器采用橄榄色和金色的卡通恐龙花纹图案。 恐龙，外星人还有彗星。我的天！
